completed_slice: Wire GitHub artifact attestation signing and verification into the Cloudflare Pages research deployment evidence path without weakening deny-by-default acceptance.

verification.source_behavior: The workflow now signs exact proof bytes with actions/attest-build-provenance, verifies with gh attestation verify, normalizes exact identity evidence, and passes the result into the acceptance gate.
verification.workflow_run: No run associated with the latest commit was available at inspection time.
verification.deployment_proof: No Cloudflare URL or served commit identity was produced.

remaining_blocker: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment and dispatch the workflow.
next_action: Execute the workflow, inspect the cryptographic verifier and acceptance artifacts, verify the returned pages.dev hostname and served source commit, and preserve the completed proof packet as deployment evidence.
